decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1.5% and S&P 500 up 0.7%, which directly benefits our tech-heavy portfolio in AAPL, GOOGL, AMZN, and QQQ. Despite having 4 open slots, cash sits at only $180.54 — well below the $500 minimum threshold — so no new positions can be opened today. We hold steady and let the rally work in our favor.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equity markets posted a solid risk-on session Thursday, with the NASDAQ surging 1.5% and the S&P 500 rising 0.7%, driven by renewed investor confidence in AI infrastructure spending and cooling fears around near-term Federal Reserve rate policy. Semiconductor and large-cap technology names led broad-based buying, with names like AMD and NVDA posting outsized gains. The session reflected a rotation back into growth stocks after recent macro uncertainty weighed on risk appetite.
market_education.summary_zh: 週四美股呈現明顯的風險偏好格局，那斯達克指數大漲1.5%，標普500指數上升0.7%，主因是投資人對人工智慧基礎建設支出的信心重燃，加上市場對聯準會短期升息的憂慮有所降溫。半導體及大型科技股全面走強，AMD及輝達等個股漲幅尤為突出。此輪上漲反映市場在此前宏觀不確定性壓制風險情緒後，資金重新流入成長型股票。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that targets stocks showing strong recent price trends and bullish technical signals — such as RSI in the 55–70 'sweet spot' and MACD crossovers — betting that assets already moving up tend to keep climbing in the short term. Today's top screener candidates like AAOI, HIMX, and APPF all score 95 because every key signal is aligned: RSI in bullish range (not yet overbought), MACD above its signal line, and price above the 20-day moving average. Risk-on days like today are when momentum strategies typically shine, as rising confidence pushes trending stocks further.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略專門尋找近期價格趨勢強勁、技術信號正面的股票——例如RSI處於55至70的「黃金區間」以及MACD金叉——其邏輯是：已在上漲的資產短期內往往會繼續走高。今日篩選器中評分達95分的AAOI、HIMX及APPF等個股，正是因為所有關鍵指標同步看漲：RSI在強勢區間但尚未超買、MACD位於訊號線之上、股價高於20日移動平均線。像今天這樣的風險偏好交易日，正是動能策略最能發揮效用的時候，投資人信心的回升將推動強勢股進一步上行。
